entries.description: No encounter
A pack of wolves emerges from the underbrush
A black bear rummaging through the brush
A group of desperate bandits blocking the path
A bandit captain and their gang demand a toll
Giant rats swarm from a hollow log
An owlbear crashes through the trees
A traveling merchant on the road, packs heavy with wares
A Threadwalker patrol — road-dusty, quiet, competent. They share news.
An abandoned Wardweaver camp with 1d4 thread supplies among the cold ashes
No encounter
Environmental anomaly — fog thickens, sounds arrive late, tree trunks spiral
Looselings — tangles of animate thread skitter from the undergrowth
A Thread-puppet scarecrow lurches to life in a field
Wolves — one Fray-touched with glowing eyes and cold bite
Bandits, desperate and fleeing the Thinning. May negotiate.
A Frayed One — flickering between solid and translucent, speaking in fragments
A Thread-eater — long-limbed silhouette of dark knotted threads, hunting wards
A Fray pocket — the air tastes of copper, shadows point the wrong way
A Weaver's Mark carved into a standing stone, faintly glowing
A Loom Stone fragment half-buried in the earth, humming with faint warmth
No encounter — rare, the Fray is active here
Environmental hazard: gravity shift, time loop, or spatial fold
Looselings swarm from a crack in the air
Thread-eaters prowl in formation, drawn by the party's equipment
A Frayed One stumbles through with Looselings trailing it
A Hollow Walker — tall, thin, limbs bending at wrong angles, moving in stop-motion
The Unspun — a mass of raw Fray material, faces forming and dissolving in its surface
Fray storm — reality shudders, force damage pulses outward
A Hollow Court salvager team — adapted, slightly off, but willing to trade
An intact Weaver artifact rests in a pocket of calm within the chaos
A Fray breach — a portal-like tear in reality, pulling at everything nearby

dungeonModifiers.description: Replace beast encounters with undead equivalents (+1 CR)
Replace beast encounters with undead equivalents (+1 CR)
Add 25% chance of cave-specific creatures (giant spiders CR 1, piercers CR 1/2)
Add 25% chance of oozes (gray ooze CR 1/2, ochre jelly CR 2)
All humanoid encounters are bandits; increase numbers by 50%
Replace all encounters with arcane constructs or trapped rooms
Replace with undead + environmental horror (DC checks vs. Frightened)
